metadata.name: sentinel_ai
metadata.description: SentinelAI — On-chain Execution Control Layer for autonomous AI agents on Solana

docs: SentinelAI — On-chain Execution Control Layer for autonomous AI agents.
Four instructions:
1. initialize_agent_profile — Create a new agent profile (reputation = 50)
2. set_policy — Set or update execution policy for an agent
3. submit_transaction — Validate and execute a transaction (with circuit breaker)
4. unfreeze_agent — Owner-only instruction to unfreeze a frozen agent

instructions.name: initialize_agent_profile
docs: Initialize a new agent profile with default reputation score.
Property 1: Agent Profile Initialization Invariant
Property 2: Double Initialization Rejection (Anchor handles via `init`)

accounts.name: agent_profile
docs: The agent's profile PDA. Derived from the agent's public key.

accounts.name: agent
docs: The agent whose profile is being created.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The account paying for the profile's rent.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for creating accounts.

instructions.name: set_policy
docs: Set or update the execution policy for an agent.
Property 3: Policy Round-Trip
Property 4: Unauthorized Policy Rejection

accounts.name: agent_policy
docs: The agent policy PDA. Derived from the owner's public key.

accounts.name: owner
docs: The owner of this policy. Must sign both creation and updates.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: submit_transaction
docs: Submit a transaction for validation and execution.
Flow: frozen check → decay → reputation gate → policy checks → tiered check →
CPI transfer → reputation update → emit event

accounts.name: agent_profile
docs: Agent profile PDA (mutable — reputation and counters are updated).

accounts.name: agent_policy
docs: Agent policy PDA (read-only — used for validation only).

accounts.name: agent
docs: The agent submitting the transaction. Must sign.

accounts.name: receiver
docs: The receiver of the SOL transfer.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program — required for CPI SOL transfer.

instructions.name: unfreeze_agent
docs: Unfreeze a frozen agent — owner-only.
Resets frozen = false and consecutive_failures = 0.
Requirements: 16.7
Property 22: Circuit Breaker Reset

accounts.name: agent_profile
docs: Agent profile PDA (mutable — frozen and consecutive_failures are reset).

accounts.name: owner
docs: The owner of the agent's policy. Must sign.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the policy owner

errors.name: ReceiverNotAllowed
errors.msg: Receiver does not match policy allowed receiver

errors.name: AgentFrozen
errors.msg: Agent is frozen by circuit breaker — owner must unfreeze

types.name: AgentPolicy
docs: AgentPolicy — On-chain account storing owner-defined execution rules.
PDA seeds: ["agent_policy", owner_pubkey]
Requirements: 2.1, 22.1, 22.2

fields.name: owner
docs: Owner of this policy (must sign updates).

fields.name: max_amount
docs: Maximum allowed transaction amount in lamports.

fields.name: allowed_receiver
docs: Only this receiver public key is permitted.

fields.name: min_reputation
docs: Minimum agent reputation required to execute.

fields.name: private_mode
docs: If true, transaction details are hidden (PER mode).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: high_value_threshold
docs: Amount threshold above which high-value checks apply.
Set to 0 to disable tiered policy.

fields.name: high_value_min_reputation
docs: Minimum reputation required for high-value transactions.

types.name: AgentProfile
docs: AgentProfile — On-chain account storing an agent's reputation and tx counters.
PDA seeds: ["agent_profile", agent_pubkey]

fields.name: agent_pubkey
docs: The public key of the AI agent this profile belongs to.

fields.name: owner
docs: The human or entity wallet that owns and governs this agent profile.

fields.name: reputation_score
docs: Reputation score, starts at 50. Increases by 10 on success,
decreases by 5 (saturating) on reputation-gated rejection.

fields.name: total_transactions
docs: Total number of transactions submitted (includes rejected).

fields.name: successful_transactions
docs: Number of successfully executed transactions.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for derivation verification.

fields.name: consecutive_failures
docs: Number of consecutive failures. Reset to 0 on success.
When this reaches CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD (3), agent is frozen.

fields.name: frozen
docs: If true, the agent is frozen by the circuit breaker.
A frozen agent cannot submit transactions until unfrozen by the owner.

fields.name: last_transaction_slot
docs: The Solana slot number of the last transaction.
Used to calculate reputation decay for idle agents.

types.name: AgentUnfrozen
docs: Emitted when an agent is unfrozen by its owner.

types.name: CircuitBreakerTripped
docs: Emitted when the circuit breaker trips (agent frozen).

types.name: TransactionProcessed
docs: Emitted after every submit_transaction call, both on approval and rejection.
